entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The primary legume crop being studied for varietal adoption and technology use in Nigeria

entities.name: SAMNUT 23
entities.description: An improved variety of groundnut introduced to farmers in Nigeria

entities.name: SAMNUT 24
entities.description: An improved variety of groundnut introduced to farmers in Nigeria, showing specific adoption rates in PLGA and NPLGA

entities.name: SAMNUT 25
entities.description: An improved variety of groundnut introduced to farmers in Nigeria

entities.name: SAMNUT 26
entities.description: An improved variety of groundnut introduced to farmers in Nigeria

entities.name: KAMPALA
entities.description: A local variety of groundnut used as a comparison to improved varieties

entities.name: SOKOTO STATE
entities.description: One of the two administrative states in Northwestern Nigeria where the adoption survey was conducted

entities.name: KEBBI STATE
entities.description: One of the two administrative states in Northwestern Nigeria where the adoption survey was conducted

entities.name: NORTHWESTERN NIGERIA
entities.description: The geographical region encompassing Sokoto and Kebbi states where the research was focused

entities.name: NIGERIA
entities.description: The country where the groundnut varietal adoption study was performed

entities.name: ADOPTION SURVEY
entities.description: The research methodology used to evaluate the uptake of improved groundnut varieties and technologies

entities.name: PLGA
entities.description: Administrative units where a donor-funded project for groundnut technology was executed

entities.name: NPLGA
entities.description: Administrative units where project actions for groundnut technology were absent

entities.name: FARMING EXPERIENCE
entities.description: A socio-economic factor found to significantly influence the decision to adopt groundnut technologies

entities.name: LEVEL OF EDUCATION
entities.description: A socio-economic factor found to significantly influence the decision to adopt groundnut technologies

entities.name: HOUSEHOLD SIZE
entities.description: A socio-economic factor found to significantly influence the decision to adopt groundnut technologies

entities.name: GROUNDNUT VARIETAL TECHNOLOGIES
entities.description: The set of improved groundnut varieties and associated agricultural techniques

entities.name: CROP MANAGEMENT PRACTICES
entities.description: The agricultural management techniques that accompany the adoption of improved groundnut varieties

entities.name: GROSS PROFIT MARGINS
entities.description: The economic indicator used to measure the financial benefit of adopting improved groundnut technologies
